title: taraxacum umbonulatum
intro: Taraxacum umbonulatum, commonly known as the western dandelion, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum umbonulatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically.
